rulings.Case Title: WING CHAN et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 25, 2013, line 1: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST CO. N.A., and FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the first cause of action for violation of CCC 2923.6, no private right of action. See Farner v. Countrywide 2009 WL 189025. Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to all other causes of action to allege tender; to allege all necessary elements of each cause of action; and to allege facts with specificity where applicable. Bryan Cave, LLP, Andrea Hicks, Margaret Kane Thies, and George Keller are ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. See CGC-12-525942, CGC-12-527329. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KRISTINA M. DOORLAG et al VS. VINCENT PASQUINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Pltfs' Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Reocrds On Dppm; And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 25, 2013, line 2: DEFENDANT VINCENT PASQUINI, JAYMI TEDDY Notice Of Motion To Quash Pltfs' Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Reocrds On Dppm; And Imposing Monetary Sanctions OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for July 26, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of moving papers with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than June 28, 2013. = (501/REQ)
